Off Calendar Apr-11-2011 Judgment Entered

Judge Elliott Myles, clerk Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 414.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Teola Watson appears through Pat Howard. Respondent, Sandrine LePironnec appears through her attoney Mitra Jalali. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
